query: INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, passwordHash, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) VALUES (CONCAT('password_', UUID()), 'Luis Cardoso', 'jefe.taller@innovar.temp', 'password', '$2b$10$5a/1xcXbuR/6tp1w1VyH6O97dVJddmCQCHeUuqLEkVlqk6hO68cQu', 'jefe_taller', NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
